sections_cited: section 42 of the Specific Relief Act

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-177 of 2015 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of M.A. 1018/2015 3. For hearing of M.A. 2898/2015 4. For hearing of main case 08.08.2023 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh. ----- On 07.09.2022 petitioners’ counsel was put on notice to assist in relation to the maintainability of this petition which seeks inclusion of settlement of Mustafa Goth in Master List as Katchi Abadi and issue such documents of ownership as required to the occupants / possession. First of all this petition cannot encompass such dispute of the nature as described above which include the title of the land in terms of section 42 of the Specific Relief Act. Needless to mention that this alleged Goth, as informed by learned AAG, was never in the list of the sanctioned Goths. Hence, such adjudication cannot be undertaken in this petition under Article 199 of the Constitution of Islamic Republic of Pakistan 1973 which is being dismissed with no order as to costs. The petitioners however if so advised may pursue remedy available to them under the law. JUDGE JUDGE
